infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: FreightConnect needs your location to track deliveries and share your position with shippers.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: FreightConnect uses your location to show your position on the map.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: FreightConnect tracks your location during active trips, even when the app is in the background.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: FreightConnect needs camera access to take Proof of Delivery photos.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: FreightConnect needs photo library access to select Proof of Delivery images.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: FreightConnect needs your location to track deliveries during active trips.
plugins.locationAlwaysPermission: FreightConnect tracks your location during active trips, even in the background.
plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: FreightConnect uses your location to show your position on the map.

plugins.cameraPermission: FreightConnect needs camera access for Proof of Delivery photos.

plugins.photosPermission: FreightConnect needs photo access to select Proof of Delivery images.
